name: Spiced Cider
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cider into a large pot or saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the cinnamon sticks (red hots) to the pot and stir gently until they are fully immersed in the liquid.
3. Heat the mixture, stirring occasionally, until the cinnamon is warmed through and the cider reaches a hot serving temperature.
4. Serve the spiced cider immediately, allowing it to cool slightly before enjoying.
